should_trigger.prompt: Triage these review findings and create a plan
Turn the review results into actionable work items
Prioritize the findings from the code review
Help me with triage patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Plan a new feature from scratch
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: The review found 15 issues — help me decide which to fix now vs later
After fixing the bug, also check if triage needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the code and write up findings
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
